rules: 1. 🤝 Be respectful and professional at all times.
2. 💻 Keep discussions focused on development and tech topics.
3. 🚫 No spamming, flooding, or repeated messages.
4. 🔒 Do not share confidential or sensitive project information.
5. 📚 Share knowledge freely — help others learn and grow.
6. 🐛 When reporting bugs, provide clear steps to reproduce.
7. 📢 Only admins can make official announcements.
8. 🤖 Use bot commands properly — do not abuse the bot.
9. 🌍 English is the primary language for technical discussions.
10. ⚠️ Three warnings result in removal from the group.
